verification_gate: Owner (David / Governance Board) records a bounded decision resolving POSTV0-Q3 with an explicit unblock condition, a deferral-or-rollback rule, and the current default preserved until unblocked.

gate_result.question: POSTV0-Q3
gate_result.decision: CECCA remains the single internal CEO-agent role in v0; company hierarchy modeling stays minimal and does not dilute CECCA's responsibility boundary.
gate_result.unblock_condition: A post-v0 RFC expanding company hierarchy modeling with explicit role boundaries and owner sign-off.
gate_result.deferral_rollback_rule: Hierarchy modeling reverts to the single CECCA CEO-agent boundary.

proof_summary: DECIDE-006 records the owner-ratified bounded decision for POSTV0-Q3 (company hierarchy modeling depth): CECCA remains the single internal CEO-agent role in v0; company hierarchy modeling stays minimal and does not dilute CECCA's responsibility boundary. Unblock condition and deferral/rollback rule are recorded in 09_OPEN_QUESTIONS.md. The v0 default is preserved until an explicit unblock RFC with owner sign-off. No product execution performed.
